<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `php-switcher`

Switch between PHP versions installed via Homebrew


- **Usage**: `php-switcher [FLAGS] [version]`

## Arguments

### `[version]`

PHP version (e.g., 7.4, 8.0) or 'latest'

## Flags

### `--help`

Show help

### `--installed`

List installed PHP versions

### `--current`

Show currently active version

### `--auto`

Auto-switch based on .php-version file
